name: Quick Beef Stew II
recipeIngredient: 16 oz Can tiny white potatoes, drained
2 cups to 3 cups cubed cooked beef
recipeInstructions:
1. In a deep, 2-quart, heat-resistant, non-metallic casserole, heat oil in Microwave Oven for 2 minutes.
2. Add onion and heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 3 minutes or until tender. Stir occasionally.
3. Add bay leaf, carrots, potatoes, salt, pepper, celery salt, beef gravy, and beef; stir to combine.
4. Heat, covered, in Microwave Oven for 6 to 7 minutes or until almost heated. Taste and correct seasoning, if necessary, with additional salt and pepper.
5. Remove bay leaf and discard.
6. Add peas and heat, covered, in Microwave Oven for 2 to 3 minutes or until heated through.
